calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1630 Wallace Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Debra Dolch (Temporary Trustee).

The Court noted that there are waivers of notice of the amended petition, but no proof of posting. Ms. Fox stated that they did proof of posting of the original petition, that she tried to file proof of posting of the amended petition, but Judge Stewart instructed one thing, that the Examiner says something else that the Clerk at the filing window told her they did not need it because they already did it and that she is requesting that posting be waived. Ms. Fox also stated that there is no substantive change between the original petition and the amended one, and that the only difference is the date of acceptance of the offer. The Court grants Ms. Fox's request and waives posting of the amended petition. The sale was confirmed at $660,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 22, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $610,000.00 is required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Continued To May-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Stipulation And Joint Ex Parte Application For An Order Appointing Temporary Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for and with Tanya Scott.
Sil Liapis for and with Michael Scott (Beneficiary/Objector/Petitioner).

Mr. Liapis stated that they have spoken, that Mr. Katz intends to move forward today with the appointment of Ms. Scott and that he (Mr. Liapis) would like to do mediation. Mr. Katz stated that he would like his Client to be appointed and that they need to proceed with the tax lien sale today. The Court informed Mr. Katz that there is no ex parte petition before it to appoint a temporary trustee. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 16, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 23, 2019. The Petition for Instructions is continued to and the Parties are to return on April 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to report on status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for and with Tanya Scott.
Michael Scott in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that before it is a petition alleging that Tanya Scott is the successor trustee and the sole beneficiary of the trust. Mr. Scott stated that he is here to speak against that and that he does not agree with it. Mr. Katz asked the Court to bifurcate the trustee issue from the beneficiary issue. The Court asked Mr. Scott if he was willing to agree with Mr. Katz's request. Mr. Scott stated that he wants to speak with a Lawyer before answering. The Petition for Instructions is continued to February 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Scott to file his objections. The Court encouraged Mr. Scott to get an Attorney. Any filings by Mr. Scott are to be filed by February 19, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
